name: api
description: This project was bootstrapped with Fastify-CLI.

scripts.test: npm run build:ts && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json && c8 node --test -r ts-node/register "test/**/*.ts"
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:ts && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json && node --test -r ts-node/register "test/unit/**/*.ts"
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:ts && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json && node --test -r ts-node/register "test/integration/**/*.ts"
scripts.start: npm run build:ts && node scripts/fastify-with-env.mjs start -l info -P dist/app.js
